project.name: tang-dynasty-assistant
project.description: 基于三省六部制的AI多Agent协作个人助理系统

stages.name: environment-setup
stages.description: 环境初始化和依赖安装

steps.command: cd d:\Code\Java\TangDynasty && npm create vite@latest tang-dynasty-frontend -- --template react-ts

cd d:\Code\Java\TangDynasty && curl https://start.spring.io/starter.zip -d dependencies=web,data-jpa,data-redis,data-mongodb,validation,security -d language=java -d bootVersion=3.2.0 -d baseDir=tang-dynasty-backend -d groupId=com.tangdynasty -d artifactId=tang-dynasty-backend -d name='Tang Dynasty Backend' -d description='Tang Dynasty Assistant Backend' -d packageName=com.tangdynasty.backend -o tang-dynasty-backend.zip
cd d:\Code\Java\TangDynasty && unzip tang-dynasty-backend.zip && rm tang-dynasty-backend.zip

files.content:
-- 初始化数据库
CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS tang_dynasty DEFAULT CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

USE tang_dynasty;

-- 用户表
CREATE TABLE users (
    user_id VARCHAR(32) PRIMARY KEY COMMENT '用户ID',
    username VARCHAR(50) UNIQUE NOT NULL COMMENT '用户名',
    email VARCHAR(100) UNIQUE NOT NULL COMMENT '邮箱',
    password_hash VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL COMMENT '密码哈希',
    role VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'user' COMMENT '角色',
    status TINYINT DEFAULT 1 COMMENT '状态：1-启用，0-禁用',
    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='用户表';

-- 任务表
CREATE TABLE tasks (
    task_id VARCHAR(32) PRIMARY KEY COMMENT '任务ID',
    user_id VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL COMMENT '用户ID',
    title VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL COMMENT '任务标题',
    content TEXT COMMENT '任务内容',
    status ENUM('Pending', 'ChengXiang', 'Zhongshu', 'Menxia', 'Assigned', 'Doing', 'Review', 'Done') DEFAULT 'Pending',
    priority ENUM('low', 'normal', 'high', 'critical') DEFAULT 'normal',
    metadata JSON COMMENT '扩展元数据',
    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    INDEX idx_user_id (user_id),
    INDEX idx_status (status),
    INDEX idx_priority (priority),
    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(user_id)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='任务主表';

-- 任务流转日志表
CREATE TABLE task_logs (
    log_id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    task_id VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL,
    from_state VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
    to_state VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
    actor VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
    remark TEXT,
    timestamp TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    INDEX idx_task_id (task_id),
    INDEX idx_timestamp (timestamp),
    FOREIGN KEY (task_id) REFERENCES tasks(task_id)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='任务状态流转日志';

-- Agent表
CREATE TABLE agents (
    agent_id VARCHAR(32) PRIMARY KEY COMMENT 'Agent ID',
    name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL COMMENT 'Agent名称',
    type VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL COMMENT 'Agent类型',
    department VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL COMMENT '所属部门',
    status VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'active' COMMENT '状态',
    config JSON COMMENT '配置信息',
    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='Agent表';

-- 初始化数据
INSERT INTO users (user_id, username, email, password_hash, role) VALUES

name: CI/CD Pipeline

on:
  push:
    branches: [ main, develop ]
  pull_request:
    branches: [ main ]

jobs:
  test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    strategy:
      matrix:
        node-version: [18.x, 20.x]
        java-version: [17, 21]
    
    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4
    
    - name: Setup Node.js
      uses: actions/setup-node@v4
      with:
        node-version: ${{ matrix.node-version }}
        cache: 'npm'
        cache-dependency-path: tang-dynasty-frontend/package-lock.json
    
    - name: Setup Java
      uses: actions/setup-java@v4
      with:
        java-version: ${{ matrix.java-version }}
        distribution: 'temurin'
        cache: maven
    
    - name: Install frontend dependencies
      run: |
        cd tang-dynasty-frontend
        npm ci
    
    - name: Run frontend tests
      run: |
        cd tang-dynasty-frontend
        npm run test:ci
    
    - name: Build frontend
      run: |
        cd tang-dynasty-frontend
        npm run build
    
    - name: Install backend dependencies
      run: |
        cd tang-dynasty-backend
        mvn dependency:go-offline
    
    - name: Run backend tests
      run: |
        cd tang-dynasty-backend
        mvn test
    
    - name: Build backend
      run: |
        cd tang-dynasty-backend
        mvn package -DskipTests

  security-scan:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: test
    
    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4
    
    - name: Run security audit
      run: |
        cd tang-dynasty-frontend
        npm audit --audit-level moderate
    
    - name: Run OWASP dependency check
      uses: dependency-check/Dependency-Check_Action@main
      with:
        project: 'tang-dynasty-backend'
        path: 'tang-dynasty-backend'
        format: 'HTML'

  deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [test, security-scan]
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main'
    
    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4
    
    - name: Build Docker images
      run: |
        docker build -t tang-dynasty/frontend:latest ./tang-dynasty-frontend
        docker build -t tang-dynasty/backend:latest ./tang-dynasty-backend
    
    - name: Deploy to staging
      run: |
        docker-compose -f docker-compose.yml up -d

{
  "name": "tang-dynasty-frontend",
  "private": true,
  "version": "1.0.0",
  "type": "module",
  "scripts": {
    "dev": "vite",
    "build": "tsc && vite build",
    "lint": "eslint . --ext ts,tsx --report-unused-disable-directives --max-warnings 0",
    "preview": "vite preview",
    "test": "vitest",
    "test:ci": "vitest run",
    "test:coverage": "vitest run --coverage"
  },
  "dependencies": {
    "antd": "^5.12.0",
    "@ant-design/x": "^1.0.0",
    "axios": "^1.6.0",
    "react": "^18.2.0",
    "react-dom": "^18.2.0",
    "react-router-dom": "^6.20.0",
    "@reduxjs/toolkit": "^2.0.0",
    "react-redux": "^9.0.0",
    "dayjs": "^1.11.0",
    "lodash": "^4.17.21",
    "recharts": "^2.8.0"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@types/lodash": "^4.14.0",
    "@types/react": "^18.2.0",
    "@types/react-dom": "^18.2.0",
    "@typescript-eslint/eslint-plugin": "^6.14.0",
    "@typescript-eslint/parser": "^6.14.0",
    "@vitejs/plugin-react": "^4.2.0",
    "@vitest/coverage-v8": "^1.0.0",
    "eslint": "^8.55.0",
    "eslint-plugin-react": "^7.33.0",
    "eslint-plugin-react-hooks": "^4.6.0",
    "eslint-plugin-react-refresh": "^0.4.5",
    "prettier": "^3.1.0",
    "typescript": "^5.2.2",
    "vite": "^5.0.0",
    "vitest": "^1.0.0"
  }
}
